runway_notes.15:
RWY 15 - asphalt, left-hand pattern (inference).
Elev 1594 ft; pattern altitude 2594 ft (1000 ft AGL), round to 2600 ft.
Uncontrolled, no published frequency in apt.dat.
Private airfield (Flying Ranch AG); PPR may apply.
Open rural topography, no TMA conflicts.
runway_notes.33:
RWY 33 - asphalt, right-hand pattern (inference).
Elev 1594 ft; pattern altitude 2594 ft (1000 ft AGL), round to 2600 ft.
Uncontrolled, no published frequency in apt.dat.
Private airfield (Flying Ranch AG); PPR may apply.
Runway extended south by 160 m in October 2010 per Wikipedia.

metadata.source: X-Plane apt.dat (ARP, runway thresholds); Wikipedia DE for elevation and runway dimensions; VRPs are plausibility-based topographic inferences
metadata.verified_by: thWelly + plugin-author research; VRPs and pattern direction are plausibility-based - needs verification against current Skyguide VAC before flight
metadata.notes: ARP 47.2267 N / 8.0781 E and runway 15/33 asphalt 570 m x 15 m taken from apt.dat and Wikipedia. VRPs N/E/S/W placed approximately 2-3 NM from ARP toward Schoeftland (N), Schlierbach (E), Buron (S) and the Suhre valley (W) - they are NOT the published Skyguide VAC points. Pattern direction (15=left, 33=right) is the conservative default; verify against VAC. No INFO/AFIS frequency listed in apt.dat. Operator: Flying Ranch AG (private).
